what_it_does: Records a channel attachment metadata entry that links attachment att-32ff98f4 to board item item-672962c5 in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
target uses a board:// URI scheme
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
standouts: Use of board:// URI scheme for the target reference
conventions: Filename derived from the id field
notes: A minimal channel attachment stub that records a directed link from attachment att-32ff98f4 to board item item-672962c5.
questions: What is the content or semantic role of the referenced board item?
Is the relationship bidirectional or mirrored elsewhere?
What distinguishes the board_items attachment type from other attachment types?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment record matches its content: it stores a link between an attachment and a board item.
intention_signals: To maintain a persistent, queryable record associating a channel attachment with a specific board item.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to identify the target board item.
contribution: Provides a concrete attachment-to-board-item linkage that a fused system can use to reconstruct channel memory relationships.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata file recording that attachment att-32ff98f4 of type board_items targets board item item-672962c5 in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To persist the association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for retrieval and relationship tracing.
